name: secure-rest-api-with-spring-security
description: Validate that the skill produces a secure Spring Boot REST API with Spring Security 6 lambda DSL, JWT authentication, record DTOs, and proper test coverage.
prompt: Create a Spring Boot 3.4 REST API for a product catalog. Use Java records for ProductRequest and ProductResponse DTOs. Implement Spring Security 6 with a SecurityFilterChain bean using the lambda DSL to configure JWT authentication with a bearer token filter. Add @PreAuthorize for admin-only create and delete. Include a ProductController with GET (list, by-id), POST (create), and DELETE endpoints. Write a @WebMvcTest with MockMvc that tests both authorized and unauthorized access.

assertions.description: Must define a SecurityFilterChain bean using Spring Security 6's component-based configuration instead of the removed WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.
Must use Java records for DTO definitions to enforce immutability and reduce boilerplate.
Must use @PreAuthorize with SpEL expressions for method-level authorization on restricted endpoints.
Must use MockMvc for controller-layer integration testing that exercises the security filter chain.
Must use @WebMvcTest slice annotation to load only the web layer without the full application context.

name: reactive-webflux-endpoint
description: Validate that the skill produces correct reactive WebFlux endpoints with Mono/Flux return types, WebClient for external calls, reactive security, and WebTestClient for testing.
prompt: Build a Spring Boot 3.4 reactive endpoint for a real-time stock price service. Create a @RestController that returns a Flux<StockPrice> stream using Server-Sent Events. Use WebClient to fetch prices from an external API. Add reactive Spring Security with a SecurityWebFilterChain bean that requires authentication for the stream endpoint. Include a record for StockPrice, a service that aggregates prices with Flux operators (map, filter, onErrorResume), and a @SpringBootTest with WebTestClient that verifies the SSE stream and security.

assertions.description: Must use Flux return type for streaming reactive responses such as Server-Sent Events.
Must use WebClient for non-blocking HTTP calls to external services in the reactive pipeline.
Must define SecurityWebFilterChain for reactive security configuration instead of the servlet-based SecurityFilterChain.
Must use WebTestClient for testing reactive endpoints including SSE streams and security.
Must produce TEXT_EVENT_STREAM media type for Server-Sent Events endpoints.
